popularStory.headline: History of Samuel and Elizabeth Packard follows:
popularStory.description:
SAMUEL PACKARD (1612-1694)
ELIZABETH ______
Samuel Packard was born about 1612 in Windham, England. He was born and raised on a farm called “Coleman’s” in the village of Stonham Aspal in Suffolk Count …

person.userCertifiedLifeSummary: "Samuel Packard's only wife. She married John Washburn Jr. as his 2nd wife", "Elizabeth Packard widow." Her parents are unknown as of 2019. She is NOT Elizabeth Mitchell, John Washburn Jr.'s 1st wife, NOR is there any evidence that she was "Elizabeth Stream", as is often suggested. She is also shown as "Eliza" in multiple records.

sourceList.title: Eliza Packard, in the birth record of her son John Packard, July 20, 1665, in Town of Weymouth, Norfolk, Massachusetts, Births, Register, 1633-1844, p. 145, in “Massachusetts, Town Clerk, Vital and Town Records, 1626-2001”
Elizabeth Washburn - Find A Grave Memorial

Samuel Packard, in the deed of his wife Elizabeth Packard Washburn to Sam James, an Indian, Oct. 27, 1694, recorded Oct. 22, 1713 in Plymouth County, Massachusetts Deed Records, vol. 10 (1713-1714), p. 333-335, in “Massachusetts Land Records, 1620-1986.”

zh.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Stream於1614年4月出生在英國諾福爾可維蒙達哈姆。她於大約1635年與Samuel Packard在英國英格蘭素福爾可斯頓哈姆 阿斯帕爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和9個女兒的父母。她於1638年移民到美國麻薩諸塞州素福爾可波斯頓。她去世於1694年10月27日在美國麻薩諸塞州普萊姆斯布利其沃特享年80歲，埋葬在美國康乃狄克州文達哈姆文達哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Stream于1614年4月出生在英国諾福爾可維蒙達哈姆。她于大约1635年与Samuel Packard在英国英格兰素福爾可斯頓哈姆 阿斯帕爾结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和9个女儿的父母。她于1638年移民到美国马萨诸塞州素福爾可波斯頓。她去世于1694年10月27日在美国马萨诸塞州普萊姆斯布利其沃特享年80岁，埋葬在美国康涅狄格州文達哈姆文達哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Stream
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English stre(a)m(e) ‘stream’ (Old English strēam). The surname may be topographic, for someone who lived beside a stream, or habitational, from a place so named, such as Stream in Williton (Somerset).
Americanized form (translation into English) of Swedish Ström and Norwegian Strøm (see Strom ).

variants.name: Strom
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Lars, Nils, Sven, Alvar, Anders, Aslaug, Astrid, Helmer, Jarl, Knut, Sigfrid.
Swedish (Ström) and Danish (Strøm): from ström, strøm ‘current’, a topographic name for someone who lived by a river or a stream, or an ornamental name. Compare Stream 2, Strome , and Strum .
Norwegian (Strøm): habitational name from any of numerous farmsteads so named from Old Norse straumr ‘current, stream’. Compare 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

en.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Stream was born in April 1614, in Wymondham, Norfolk, England. She married Samuel Packard about 1635, in Stonham Aspal, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 9 daughters. She immigrated to Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts, United States in 1638. She died on 27 October 1694, in Bridgewater, Plymouth, Massachusetts, United States, at the age of 80, and was buried in Windham, Windham, Connecticut, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Stream est née en avril 1614, à Wymondham, Norfolk, Angleterre. Elle a épousé Samuel Packard environ 1635, à Stonham Aspal, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 9 filles. Elle a immigré au Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts, États-Unis en 1638. Elle est décédée le 27 octobre 1694, à Bridgewater, Plymouth, Massachusetts, États-Unis, à l’âge de 80 ans, et a été enterrée à Windham, Windham, Connecticut, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Stream wurde im April 1614 in Wymondham, Norfolk, England geboren. Sie hat um 1635 in Stonham Aspal, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Samuel Packard geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 9 Töchter. Sie ist 1638 nach Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten eingewandert. Sie starb am 27. Oktober 1694 im Alter von 80 Jahren in Bridgewater, Plymouth, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Windham, Windham, Connecticut, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Stream è nata il nel aprile 1614 nel Wymondham, Norfolk, England. Lei sposato Samuel Packard circa 1635, nel Stonham Aspal, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 9 figlie. Immigrata nel Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1638. Morì il 27 ottobre 1694, nel Bridgewater, Plymouth, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 80 anni, e fu sepolta a Windham, Windham, Connecticut, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Streamは1614年4月にイギリスノーフォルクウイモンドハムで生まれた。約1635年にイギリスイギリススフォルクストンハム アスプアルでSamuel Packardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と9人の娘の親であった。彼女は1638年にアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州スフォルクボストンに移住した。彼女は1694年10月27日にアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州プリモウスブリジェワターで80歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ウィンドハムウィンドハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Stream(은)는 1614년 4월 영국 노르폴크 윈이몽함에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1635년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 스토함 아스팔에서 Samuel Packard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 아홉 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1638년에 미국 매사추세츠 주 수폴크 보스턴로 이민을 떠났다. 그녀는 1694년 10월 27일 미국 매사추세츠 주 플림우스 브리지왓어에서 80세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 코네티컷 주 윈드함 윈드함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Stream nasceu em abril de 1614, em Wymondham, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com Samuel Packard aproximadamente 1635, em Stonham Aspal, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 9 filhas. Ela imigrou para o Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América em 1638. Ela faleceu em 27 de outubro de 1694, em Bridgewater, Plymouth, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América, com 80 anos, e foi sepultada em Windham, Windham, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Stream родилась апрель 1614 г. в местности вимондхам, норфолк, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Samuel Packard около 1635 г. в местности стонам аспаль, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 9 дочерей. Она иммигрировала в бостон, суффолк, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты в 1638 году. Она умерла 27 октября 1694 г. в местности бриджюэитир, плимоут, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 80 лет и была похоронена в местности виндхам, виндхам, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты.

es.Stonham Aspal, Suffolk, England, United: Stonham Aspal, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Stream nació en abril de 1614, en Wymondham, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Se casó con Samuel Packard aproximadamente 1635, en Stonham Aspal, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 9 hijas. Inmigró a Boston, Suffolk, Masachusets, Estados Unidos en 1638. Murió el 27 de octubre de 1694, en Bridgewater, Plymouth, Masachusets, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 80 años, y fue sepultada en Windham, Windham, Connecticut, Estados Unidos.
